## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint:hooks`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:runtime`

## Checklist

- [ ] No breaking changes, or marked with `breaking` label
- [ ] Labels set for release notes category (`feature` / `fix` / `docs` / `chore`)
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior changed
